sessions.title: Authentication, loyalty, and campaign lifecycle increments

milestones.event: Implemented auth endpoints (login/logout/session), lockout tracking, session cookies, and role dependencies
Added frontend login/session workflow with guarded routes and role-scoped navigation
Implemented members/loyalty domain: tiers, points accrual, points ledger, wallet account + wallet ledger, and audit events
Implemented campaign lifecycle: CRUD, coupon issuance (assignment/QR payload), redemption validation with reason codes and event traceability
Added cashier-facing member lookup and checkout redemption UI plus campaign management screens
Expanded backend tests for lockout, RBAC, points determinism, wallet safety, and campaign redemption rules
